features.name: Harness context budget pass
features.description: Reduce startup token load by keeping root state files concise and moving detailed evidence to reports and version docs.
definition_of_done: AGENTS.md tells future agents to read root state first and avoid full changelog/report ingestion unless needed.
feature_list.json tracks only the current feature, one near-term art track, and recent harness maintenance.
progress.md gives restart state, blockers, verification evidence, and next step in under about 1,000 words.
Root and docs session handoffs point to detailed reports instead of repeating every implementation event.
evidence: 2026-05-23: Root startup files were compressed and a Context Budget section was added to AGENTS.md.
2026-05-23: harness-creator validation stayed 100/100; npm run harness:gate passed with 43 files / 366 tests, data validation, and production build.
features.next_step: Keep detailed implementation history in reports and update root files only with summaries.

features.name: 20-30 minute blind playtest slice lock
features.description: Stop adding broad systems and validate a web-alpha slice where new players reach first launch, see card impact, encounter rival/staff incidents, and reach one annual review.
definition_of_done: Five real blind playtest session records are completed with exact Status: 완료.
Blind summary reports real sessions 5/5, open P0 0, missing P0 0, unrecognized status 0, and missing evidence 0.
Blind issue queue reports P0 queue 0 before final graphic asset intake.
Open P1 findings are counted as tuning follow-ups, not final-art blockers.
Blind preflight verifies tutorial modal delay and flags missing remote playtest URL before external/AGY sessions are sent.
qa:asset-handoff reports final art request possible before AGY/external art requests go out.
npm run harness:gate passes after any fixes.
evidence: 2026-05-26: v0.56 pre-art slice is code/QA-ready; latest recorded gate passed with 43 files / 406 tests, data validation, and production build.

features.name: Final source art intake
